scripts.dev: concurrently -n WEB,API -c blue,green "pnpm --filter portfolio-frontend dev" "pnpm --filter portfolio-backend dev"

scripts.format: concurrently -n WEB,API -c blue,green "pnpm --filter portfolio-frontend format" "pnpm --filter portfolio-backend format"
